# AI Flow — Multi-Agent Orchestration for VS Code

> Multi-agent AI orchestration inside VS Code. Define workflows as version-controlled YAML files, run autonomous tool-using agents, get consistent repeatable results.
>
> Install from the [VS Code Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=feima.copilot-ai-flow)
>
> Source: [GitHub](https://github.com/feimacode/feima-copilot-ai-flow)

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/getting-started/installation/): Installation and first-run guide
- [Quick Start](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/getting-started/quickstart/): Run your first flow in 60 seconds
- [Hello, Flow](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/hello-world/): Core concepts in 2 minutes
- [Pipeline Basics](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/pipeline-basics/): Sequential multi-role orchestration
- [Fork-Join](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/fork-join/): Parallel investigation patterns
- [Iteration & Convergence](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/iteration-convergence/): Refinement loops
- [Tool Control](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/tool-control/): Autonomous tool-use configuration
- [Context Files](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/context-files/): Smart token-budget-aware context injection
- [Human Gate](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/human-gate/): Human-in-the-loop approval steps
- [Dialog Simulator](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/dialog-simulator/): Multi-turn conversation simulation
- [Quality Gates](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/quality-gates/): Building quality into flows
- [Efficiency Patterns](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/efficiency-patterns/): Keeping flows fast and lean
- [Autonomous Design](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/tutorials/autonomous-design/): Designing for unattended execution
- [Choosing Execution Patterns](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/guides/execution-patterns/): Pipeline vs Iterative vs Fork-Join
- [Flow Authoring](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/guides/flow-authoring/): Concepts and best practices
- [Tool Integration](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/guides/tool-integration/): Connecting external tools
- [Referencing Files](https://flow-docs.feimacode.com/guides/referencing-files/): File patterns in flows
